title: glochidion atrovirens
intro: Glochidion atrovirens, also known as the black olive, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Glochidion atrovirens include treating skin irritations, wounds, and infections, as well as reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Glochidion atrovirens is often made into a paste or infused in water to be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
